channel.title: Pankaj Jangid — Notes
channel.description: Notes on software, entrepreneurship, governance, and the craft of building things.

item.title: Sandboxing Claude Code on macOS: Seatbelt + Privoxy
item.description: Reducing the blast radius of AI coding agents on macOS with Apple Seatbelt and an HTTPS proxy.

item.title: Process Discipline in India's Space Sector
item.description: India's space startups are building rockets. The harder problem is building the processes that make them work.

item.title: Colors of Web
item.description: Why HSL beats RGB when you actually think about colors for the web.

item.title: MacOS Contacts in Emacs
item.description: A small snippet to pull macOS Contacts into Emacs via the built-in EUDC feature.

item.title: Increasing Minimum Wage By 50% Is Not Going To Work
item.description: If a 50% wage hike is good, why not 500%? The missing piece in well-meaning wage policy.

item.title: Karamchand and Byomkesh Bakshi Were the Best Detectives
item.description: Why the best detective serials on Indian TV from the 80s and 90s still hold up.

item.title: The Grand Weight Loss Party
item.description: A gym, three friends, and ten kilograms' worth of reason to celebrate.

item.title: Perception of Right and Wrong
item.description: A bus driver, a horn, and the gap between what is legal and what feels normal.

item.title: Vashi Days of NCST
item.description: Old photos from the NCST Vashi centre and the people who made it home.

item.title: Moving On
item.description: Leaving HCL Technologies for Cadence Design Systems.

item.title: The Worst Week
item.description: A tough week for India's space program -- Agni III and INSAT-4C both failed.

item.title: Chicago Downtown Trip
item.description: A weekend trip from the suburbs into downtown Chicago and up the Sears Tower.

item.title: Sentence-Based Natural Language Plagiarism Detection
item.description: A sentence-level algorithm for plagiarism detection across natural language and source code.

item.title: CFG to Parse Roman Numerals
item.description: Working through a context-free grammar that accepts valid Roman numerals.

item.title: Life and Universe
item.description: Wondering what sits inside the smallest particle -- and who might sit outside ours.
